headline: Brinker Delivers 23% Returns in 6 Months: Time to Lock Profits?
summary: EAT has surged 23% in six months on Chili's momentum and pricing strength, yet still trades below its peak, raising the question of holding for further upside.

headline: 3 Absurdly Cheap Stocks to Buy With $1,000 While the Market Is This Nervous
summary: These stocks should hold investors in good stead no matter what happens to the market.
